# WhatsApp Intake + Handoff Kit Preview

This repository is a limited free preview for AI agent builders and automation agencies evaluating a WhatsApp intake-to-handoff workflow. The first concrete demo vertical is K-beauty / Korea medical travel.

Use this repo to inspect the workflow shape, safety boundary, demo output, and lite n8n-style skeleton.

Discovery intent: this preview should be understood as an AI agent skill, WhatsApp intake automation kit, no-code agency workflow, handoff workflow kit, medical-travel handoff demo, and human-review clinic intake workflow for builders.

Live landing page:

https://kbeauty-intake-kit-yhmxiii-0514.netlify.app

Intended buyers:

- AI agent builders packaging vertical workflow offers
- automation agencies building WhatsApp, LINE, Instagram, or web-form intake systems
- freelancers serving K-beauty, Korea medical travel, or concierge travel clients

Search and marketplace keywords:

- WhatsApp intake handoff kit
- K-beauty WhatsApp intake bot
- AI agent skill
- WhatsApp chatbot kit
- medical travel intake automation
- clinic intake workflow
- handoff JSON
- human review automation
- no-code automation agency
- bilingual clinic inquiry drafts

Fast evaluation prompt:

```text
Hi, I am visiting Seoul next month. I want help planning skincare clinic chats.
I have sensitive skin and want to avoid medical advice. Can you ask what info
you need from me first?
```

Expected preview behavior: extract low-risk logistics only, ask one safe next intake question, and route medical/procedure/clinic-choice/payment issues to human review.

The preview helps with:

- identifying K-beauty / Korea medical-travel intake messages
- extracting low-risk logistics fields
- asking one safe next intake question
- routing sensitive or medical-adjacent cases to human review
- understanding what the paid kit produces

Do not use this preview to:

- diagnose
- recommend procedures
- choose clinics
- handle deposits, refunds, or payments
- collect credentials
- contact clinics autonomously
- share personal, photo, passport, or health information without explicit consent and human review

Important files:

- `SKILL.md`: limited preview skill instructions
- `skill.json`: singular skill metadata for directories that expect one skill manifest
- `skills.json`: agent-readable preview metadata
- `kbeauty_whatsapp_intake_lite.n8n.json`: lite workflow skeleton
- `demo_input_output.md`: example input/output
- `PAID_KIT.md`: paid kit contents and checkout
- `SECURITY.md`: safety and non-executable boundary
- `mcplug_listing.md`: marketplace listing draft
- `LICENSE.md`: MIT license for the public preview files only

The full paid kit includes production SKILL.md, reusable agent prompt, handoff JSON schema, metadata, install notes, bilingual clinic inquiry drafts, builder integration spec, demo outputs, and safety boundaries.

Why a builder should buy the paid kit:

- the preview shows the workflow shape, but not the production implementation pack
- the paid kit packages a concrete vertical offer for AI agent builders and automation agencies
- it includes a full prompt, handoff schema, integration spec, demo outputs, bilingual clinic draft patterns, and safety boundary files
- it is designed to help a builder move from idea validation to a client-ready intake automation scope

Paid kit checkout:

https://kbeautytrip.lemonsqueezy.com/checkout/buy/4e42febb-e84d-4598-b5c2-0d7b35ff664b

Custom setup checkout:

https://kbeautytrip.lemonsqueezy.com/checkout/buy/a48de118-81aa-4ae4-af8f-2e3bd9bdce6d
